title: mcp-extension.json
description: Root descriptor for an mcp-languagetools extension. Must be placed at the root of the extension directory.

extensionStructure.description: Expected directory layout for an mcp-languagetools extension
notes: An extension can have multiple LSP and/or DAP servers
lsp/ and dap/ directories are optional — an extension can have only LSP, only DAP, or both
Use the add_extension tool with the extension folder path to register it
